description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a dark blue uniform with 'R.P.D.' emblazoned across the chest and back, signifying affiliation with the Raccoon Police Department. The uniform consists of a short-sleeved tactical shirt layered over a lighter long-sleeved undershirt, reinforced with black shoulder pads and elbow guards. The officer wears matching blue tactical pants with a utility belt, gloves with exposed fingers, and sturdy gray boots. Police insignia patches are visible on both shoulders, and a large shield emblem is displayed on the back. The officer has short brown hair and no visible headgear. The overall appearance is that of a patrol or tactical unit member, equipped for urban law enforcement duties.
description: A male police officer in a blue tactical uniform with R.P.D. markings, shoulder patches, gloves, and gray boots, ready for urban patrol.
description_view_0: Front view shows the R.P.D. logo on the chest, tactical vest, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the shoulder patch, utility belt, and profile of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large shield emblem and R.P.D. text on the back, as well as the back of the utility belt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the opposite shoulder patch and side profile.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark blue tactical police uniform with short-sleeved shirt over a long-sleeved undershirt, reinforced shoulder and elbow pads, matching tactical pants, black gloves, and gray boots, featuring R.P.D. markings and police insignia.
attribute_police_insignia: back shield emblem with R.P.D. text
